'''Sowsquatch''' was huge, barely tamed<ref name="Sticker">''[[Ultimate Sticker Book: Star Wars: Clone Wars]]''</ref> four-legged animal with sharp [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]]. [[Kulltu Kutta]] rode a sowsquatch during battles in [[the Cauldron]] on [[Rattatak/Legends|Rattatak]].<ref name="CW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Sowsquatch<ref name="Sticker" /> first appeared as an unidentified creature in the [[Chapter 6 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|sixth chapter]]<ref name="CW" /> of ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'', an animated television micro-series<ref name="Chapter Archive">{{SWArchive|url=clonewars/microseries/chapter/archive.html|text=View ''Clone Wars'' Chapter Archive}}</ref> produced by [[Cartoon Network]] Studios<ref name="Volume One">[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume One|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Volume One]]</ref> and originally aired on [[November 14]], [[2003]].<ref name="TV">{{TVcom|url=shows/star-wars-clone-wars/chapter-vi-276612|text=Star Wars: Clone Wars - Season 1, Episode 6: Chapter VI}}</ref> The creature was later given a name in ''[[Ultimate Sticker Book: Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'', a sticker book written by [[Simon Beecroft]] and released in [[2004]].<ref name="DK">{{DK|url=us/9780756607593-ultimate-sticker-book-star-wars-clone-wars|text=Ultimate Sticker Book: Star Wars: Clone Wars|nolive=1}}</ref> However, in later sources, no further information about the creature appeared.
